1.description: Get Kristiansand municipality polygon and kommunenummer

2.description: Select 200-year storm-surge polygons that intersect Kristiansand (will embed municipality geometry)

3.description: Select buildings in Kristiansand with point geometry

4.description: Compute nearest distance from each building to nearest storm-surge polygon

8.description: Get county polygons and names to attach county to buildings

9.description: Spatially join final buildings to county polygons to get county name

10.description: Attach municipality name from step 1 to final buildings using kommunenummer

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[9.39,58.00],[9.39,58.51],[8.88,58.51],[8.88,58.00],[9.39,58.00]]]}'),4326),25833))
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: distance
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: filter
-- source_step: 4
-- filters: ["distance_m <= 50"]

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: sort
-- source_step: 5
-- order_by: "distance_m"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: limit
-- source_step: 6
-- limit: 10

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: query [fylker]
SELECT fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 9: spatial_join
-- left_source: 7
-- right_source: 8
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

1.description: Get Kristiansand municipality polygon and kommunenummer

2.description: Select 200-year storm-surge areas intersecting the municipality (will embed municipality geometry)

3.description: Select building points for the municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

4.description: Compute distance from each building to nearest storm-surge polygon

5.description: Keep buildings within 50 meters of storm-surge areas

8.description: Get county polygons to attach county names

9.description: Spatially join the 10 buildings with counties to get county name

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[9.39,58.00],[9.39,58.51],[8.88,58.51],[8.88,58.00],[9.39,58.00]]]}'),4326),25833))
LIMIT 100;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: distance
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: filter
-- source_step: 4
-- filters: ["distance_m <= 50"]

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: sort
-- source_step: 5
-- order_by: "distance_m"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: limit
-- source_step: 6
-- limit: 10

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: query [fylker]
SELECT fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 9: spatial_join
-- left_source: 7
-- right_source: 8
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- join_type: "intersects"

8.sql:
SELECT fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson

1.description: Get Kristiansand municipality polygon and kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas overlapping Kristiansand (pre-filter by municipality bbox via embedded GeoJSON from step1)

4.description: Compute distance (m) between each building and nearest storm-surge area

5.description: Keep buildings within 50 m of storm areas

9.description: Spatially join the 10 buildings to fylker to get county name
